Mini Plan

Overview

Implement inline doc comments in two phases: tracer bullet (T1) then widen (T2-T3). All 5 tests must pass before ship.

Done when: all 5 contract tests pass, lint exits 0, Docker stack healthy.

Decision Log

#DecisionOptionsRationale
D1Use diff-match-patch for anchor resolution(a) regex, (b) dmp Bitapdmp handles fuzzy matches; regex is brittle on reformatted HTML

Tasks

T1: Tracer bullet — anchor resolution end-to-end

Goal: Prove id-first + quote-fallback resolution works on a live artifact.

Spec refs: FR-01, §9.1

Depends on: none

Steps:

  1. Write failing test for anchor resolution.
  2. Implement id-first lookup; verify test passes.
  3. Commit: git commit -m "feat(T1): anchor resolution tracer"
